headline: Previously Rejected Articles Now Recovered

article_items.title: Company : TechCrunch AI
article_items.description: [HIGH] OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks Company : TechCrunch AI Summary : Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.
